title: Subitem columns duplication?
excerpt:
Is it possible to duplicate the columns that a main task has into the subtask?! 
I need to split assigned user time on the task un-equally and the only way I can think to do this is to put one person as a subitem.

posts.author: USIkira (Kira)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to duplicate the columns that a main task has into the subtask?!

Screenshot 2021-01-18 at 11.06.551325×198 26.5 KB

I need to split assigned user time on the task un-equally and the only way I can think to do this is to put one person as a subitem.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @USIkira, thanks for posting!

You can duplicate subitems columns:

If you’re looking to split assigned user time unequally, however, I would recommend making a subitem per person and having them track time/have a numbers column on the subitems
